overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 game footage depicting a hazy, neon-lit futuristic city viewed from an elevated metro platform. The scene features dense atmospheric fog, towering buildings with bright holographic advertisements, and a yellow metro train passing by at close range.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated metro platform overlooking cyberpunk city district

events.description: camera pans right revealing bright purple and pink holographic billboards against the hazy sky

agents.ego_description: standing on the elevated platform, slowly panning view across the neon-lit cityscape

entered.detail: tall buildings with glowing cyan and pink neon signage piercing through the yellow haze
massive dark building with scattered illuminated windows
concrete platform with yellow safety line marking the edge
large vertical holographic display showing 'FASHION CHEMISTRY' with stylized green figure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a hazy cyberpunk cityscape viewed from an elevated platform. The camera slowly pans right, revealing towering buildings adorned with vibrant neon signs. A massive digital billboard advertising 'FASHION CHEMISTRY' comes into view, glowing brightly against the smog-filled atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: metro platform with passing high-speed train

events.description: yellow metro train enters frame from right, moving at high speed
passing train blocks view of city buildings, filling frame with yellow car exterior

agents.ego_description: observing the metro train as it speeds past the platform

notable_agents.action: yellow metro train car passing by at high speed with barred windows

entered.detail: futuristic yellow and black metro car with horizontal slatted windows and weathered exterior panels

segments.scene_description: A yellow metro train suddenly enters from the right, rushing past the platform and temporarily blocking the city view. The train's detailed exterior fills the frame as it moves, revealing weathered panels and futuristic design elements, while the holographic billboard remains visible but distant in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a wide, atmospheric view of a neon cityscape to a close-up encounter with a rushing metro train. It begins on an elevated platform, slowly panning right to reveal towering buildings and a massive, glowing digital billboard for Fashion Chemistry piercing through the dense smog. As the camera continues its sweep, the distant city view is suddenly interrupted by a yellow metro train entering from the right. The scene then shifts focus as the train's weathered panels and futuristic design elements fill the frame, momentarily obscuring the skyline while the holographic advertisements linger as a blurred backdrop.
